hero.subtitle: Thousands of authentic photos and videos from Burkina Faso, free to use, by Burkinabè for the whole world.

footer.tagline: The free visual library of Burkina Faso. Authentic images by Burkinabè, for the world.
footer.newsletter_desc: Receive new photos and videos from Burkina Faso every week.

about.seo_desc: Discover BurkinaVista, the free and authentic visual library of Burkina Faso. Our mission, values and how we work.
about.title: Telling the story of Burkina Faso
about.intro: BurkinaVista was born from a simple observation: international media use outdated, distorted and non-representative images of the real Burkina Faso. We decided to change that.
about.mission_title: Occupying the media space with truth
about.mission_p1: For too long, the image of Burkina Faso internationally has been defined by others — often with photos of dumps, conflicts or poverty that don't represent the cultural, architectural and human richness of our country.
about.mission_p2: BurkinaVista gives Burkinabè the tools to tell their own story. When a journalist, designer or researcher searches for an image of Burkina Faso on Google, it's
about.join_desc: Every photo you share is an act of narrative sovereignty. Together, we can change the image of Burkina Faso in the world.
about.faq_contact: To report an inappropriate image, a copyright issue or any other concern, contact us directly via the Contact page or by email at BurkinaVista@gmail.com.

guide.seo_desc: Everything you need to know to contribute quality photos and videos to BurkinaVista. Tips, rules and best practices.
guide.title: Contribute to the
guide.subtitle: Everything you need to know to share authentic photos and videos of Burkina Faso on BurkinaVista.
guide.cta_no_account: No account needed — 5 minutes is all it takes
guide.steps_title: How it works — step by step
guide.copyright_warning: By submitting media, you confirm that you are the original author or hold all necessary rights. You also confirm you have obtained consent from any persons depicted if required. Any violation of these rules may result in legal proceedings.
guide.final_desc: Your camera, your vision and your knowledge of Burkina Faso are the best tools. We'll handle the rest.

contact.seo_desc: Contact the BurkinaVista team for any question, suggestion, complaint or report. We respond within 48 hours.
contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Complaint, recommendation, advice, dispute, report — we are here for you. We respond within 48 hours.
contact.success_desc: Thank you for your message. Our team will reply within 48 hours to
contact.error: Error while sending. Please try again or write directly to

privacy.seo_desc: How BurkinaVista collects, uses and protects your personal data.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: BurkinaVista is committed to protecting your privacy. We only collect data strictly necessary for the operation of the platform. We never sell your data. We only share it with third parties with your consent or for legal obligations.
privacy.contact_for_rights: To exercise any of these rights, contact us via the Contact page or by email at BurkinaVista@gmail.com clearly stating your request and contact details. We will respond within a maximum of 30 days.
privacy.questions_desc: For any question or request regarding your personal data, our team is available to assist you.

cgu.title: Terms of Use
cgu.question_desc: We are available to answer your questions.

licences.title: Use our media
licences.subtitle: All media on BurkinaVista is published under Creative Commons licenses. Here's everything you need to know to use them correctly.
licences.question: A question about licenses or a rights issue?

upload.subtitle: Your photos and videos will be reviewed by our team before publication.
upload.success_msg: 🎉 Thank you! Your media will be reviewed within 48h.
upload.email_sent: A confirmation email was sent to
upload.team_review: Your media is reviewed by our team before publication (24–48h)
upload.info_note: Title, description and tags fields are optional. Our team ensures the quality of each media before publication.
upload.error_no_file: Please select at least one file
upload.error_name_required: First name and last name are required
